name: Mermaid CLI
description: A command-line tool and NodeJS library for rendering Mermaid diagrams to SVG/PNG/PDF locally.

auth_methods.note: Repository README and docs present only a CLI and a local NodeJS API; no hosted/public API or authentication mechanisms are documented.

credential_access.note: There is no developer signup, key issuance, or dashboard documented; the project is distributed as an open-source CLI/Node package, so conventional API credential flows are not applicable.

api_surface.note: A NodeJS in-process API (exported run function) exists for local programmatic usage (see PR adding NodeJS API); there is no REST/GraphQL hosted API. The node API surface is small (run/CLI integration). Evidence: PR adding NodeJS API and repository README.

buildability.note: No public REST/GraphQL API or developer credentials are available; integration is possible only by using the local CLI or Node library (installing package), not by calling a hosted API. Therefore building an AI-agent that requires a hosted HTTP API is blocked until a hosted API is provided. Evidence: README and docs show only local CLI/Node usage and no hosted API docs.
